name: I used Claude to brainstorm my SEO lawsuit strategy and now worried it can be used against me. What now?
description: Disclose to lawyer now; unprotected and discoverable per NY ruling.[1]

mainEntity.name: I used Claude to brainstorm my SEO lawsuit strategy and now worried it can be used against me. What now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Disclose to lawyer now; unprotected and discoverable per NY ruling.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Your Claude conversations are likely discoverable and not protected, as ruled in recent NY federal case.[1] Courts reject privilege claims for self-initiated AI use.[1] Key factors: no attorney direction, AI disclaims advice, recoverable from devices.[1][2] Cease AI use, disclose to your lawyer immediately, prepare for potential inconsistencies in discovery.[1] Directed lawyer-led AI might qualify for work product; switch to that.[1]
